name: egalvanic-api-quality
description: Pre-PR API contract, security & performance checks for eGalvanic developers. Bundles the api-contract-review skill (pagination, filters/search, max limit ≤50/100, default page size 10–20, expected records, response time, auth/IDOR/input-validation/injection) plus a zero-dependency live probe and a git hook. Same contract QA's Parallel Suite 3 enforces — run it before you open a PR.
